label: measure theory
evidence: Mathlib/MeasureTheory (11556 decls) is the dedicated measure/integration-theory folder: measures, sigma-algebras, integrals.

label: sheaf theory
evidence: Mathlib/Topology/Sheaves (555 decls) holds sheaf/presheaf definitions, sheafification, stalks — the core of sheaf theory.

label: matroid theory
evidence: Mathlib/Combinatorics/Matroid (1365 decls) is the dedicated matroid-theory folder (independence, rank, duality, minors).

label: algebraic number theory
evidence: Mathlib/NumberTheory/NumberField (1360 decls) covers number fields, rings of integers, class groups — the core objects of algebraic number theory.

label: commutative algebra
evidence: Mathlib/RingTheory (17722 decls) is overwhelmingly commutative-ring theory: ideals, localization, Noetherian/Artinian rings, valuations — the field's standard scope.

label: group theory
evidence: Mathlib/GroupTheory (8338 decls) is the dedicated group-theory folder (subgroups, quotients, Sylow, free groups, presentations).

label: mathematical logic
evidence: Mathlib/Logic (2673 decls) covers foundational logic (functions, relations, encodability); mathematical logic proper also spans ModelTheory.

label: mathematical logic
evidence: Mathlib/ModelTheory (1626 decls) formalizes model theory (languages, structures, satisfiability), a core subfield of mathematical logic.

label: algebra
evidence: Mathlib/Algebra (52510 decls) is the top-level algebra folder (groups, rings, modules, fields) matching the field's broad standard scope.

label: set theory
evidence: Mathlib/SetTheory (4562 decls) is the dedicated set-theory folder: cardinals, ordinals, ZFC, surreal numbers.

label: topology
evidence: Mathlib/Topology (25904 decls) is the dedicated general-topology folder matching the field's standard scope.

label: differential calculus
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Calculus (4084 decls) covers derivatives, differentiability, Taylor series — the core content of differential calculus.

label: convex analysis
evidence: Mathlib/Analysis/Convex (1920 decls) is the dedicated convex-analysis folder: convex sets/functions, extreme points, separation theorems.
